faqs.question: What spider species are common in Bedford, Westchester?
faqs.answer: Bedford homes commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and orb weavers. Due to Bedford's wooded environment and older homes, we also see jumping spiders and sac spiders. While most are harmless, our technicians can identify species and implement targeted control strategies to keep your home spider-free.
